title: HippoRAG: Neurobiologically Inspired Long-Term Memory for Large Language Models

defines.name: HippoRAG
defines.definition: A retrieval framework that uses a knowledge graph and Personalized PageRank to enable efficient long-term memory and multi-hop knowledge integration for LLMs.

problem: Current RAG methods encode passages in isolation and therefore struggle to integrate new knowledge across passage boundaries for complex multi-hop retrieval and reasoning tasks.
